pr.title: Implement REQ-3.4, REQ-9.2, REQ-9.4, REQ-12.4 with tests
pr.body:
## Summary

Implements four requirements from `docs/requirements.html` that were marked as NOT DONE, with full test coverage matching the acceptance criteria.

## Changes

### REQ-3.4: Tool Validation (`crates/ai-core/src/tool.rs`)
- Added `validate_tool_input()` function for JSON Schema validation of tool inputs
- Added `coerce_input()` for compatible type coercion (e.g., string "5" → integer 5)
- Added `ValidationError` struct with field path and descriptive message
- Tests: valid input passes, missing required field error with path, string-to-int coercion, invalid type error

### REQ-9.2: Output Parsing (`crates/ai-core/src/structured.rs`)
- Added `fix_json()` function to fix trailing commas and unquoted keys
- Added `extract_and_fix_json()` combining extraction with fixing
- Tests: extract from markdown code blocks, extract from prose, fix trailing comma, fix unquoted key, retry with error feedback

### REQ-9.4: Output Formatting (`crates/ai-core/src/output_format.rs`)
- New module with `OutputFormat` enum (PlainText, Markdown, CodeBlock, Table, Custom)
- `OutputFormatConfig` with template support
- `format_output()` post-processing pipeline
- Tests: markdown formatting, code block wrapping, table from JSON, custom template application

### REQ-12.4: Rate Limiting (`crates/ai-core/src/rate_limit.rs`)
- New module with `TokenBucketRateLimiter` using token bucket algorithm
- `RateLimitConfig` for RPM/TPM limits
- `try_acquire()` and `acquire()` (blocking/queuing) methods
- Per-scope (provider/model/agent) independent limits
- Tests: RPM allows exactly N requests, queued request after reset, TPM budget exceeded, independent agent limits, concurrent request handling

### Documentation
- Marked REQ-3.4, REQ-9.2, REQ-9.4, REQ-12.4 as done in `docs/requirements.html`

## Testing

All new tests pass. Pre-existing failures in `config` and `prompt_injection` modules are unrelated.
pr.author: Copilot
